mechanism: Corporate Minsky fragility is one link in the doom loop chain. A corporate credit event could trigger basis trade unwinds and term premium spikes, feeding back into fiscal costs. But household insulation limits systemic propagation, reducing the doom loop from central scenario to tail risk.
regime_dependence: Household insulation holds as long as mortgage rates remain locked below 5% and labor market remains strong; a housing repricing event would remove the insulation
